title: Secret police (disambiguation)
content:
'''Secret Police''' (also '''Political Police''') can refer to:

*[[Palpatine's Secret Police]]; a term used to describe the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*[[Imperial Security Bureau|Imperial Security Bureau]]; the secret police of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
*[[Galactic Alliance Guard]]; the secret police of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] created during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].
*[[Xim/Legends|Xim's]] [[GenoHaradan]] guild of assassins.
*[[K'ghaan]], rumored secret police of [[Ssi-ruu]] serving the [[Shreeftut]] of the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]] and said to hold black-scaled Ssi-ruuk among its ranks.
